text: Yɛlimaŋni ka n siri yɛtti ya, ni, u nin ti zaŋŋi u bunseelli kam fukumsi n‑niŋi lala daabri nuu ni.
translated: If you do not come, we will not be able to finish the work today.

ref: Then they sat down to guard him.
text: Di nyaaŋŋa ba daa zinni bɛni ka gɔsiri u ni.
translated: You should not go out without your coat.
